sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115042" key="xrusw/rufos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσώρυφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, perh. an error for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χρυσωρύχος, ἔργα,</foreign> i.e. <sense id="n115042.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">goldmines, IG Rom.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.608</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Phrygia</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
